manual-db-verification.evidence: Added migration 20260313000046_intel_monetization_signal_engagements.sql for public.user_signal_engagements plus merge RPCs for anonymous tag scores and signal engagements. Live apply/deploy was not performed in this turn.

behavior_added: Anonymous visitors now build first-party tag-affinity memory locally from signal views, clicks, saves, and likes.
Authenticated users can persist signal saves and likes into a profile-ready user_signal_engagements model, with local fallback if the migration is not yet applied.
Anonymous tag scores and anonymous save/like engagements now merge into the authenticated account on login when the new RPCs are available.
Public and portal signal detail surfaces now expose save and like controls, and business/public account pages surface saved intelligence libraries with real loading/empty/error states.
Tag-performance analytics now count signal_liked alongside clicks, detail views, and saves.
notes: This remains a local READY FOR REVIEW slice. No migration apply, edge deploy, or Cloudflare deploy was performed in this turn.
The new save/like and anonymous-memory paths fail soft when the migration has not been applied yet, so mixed environments keep working.
live-demo-detector remains WARN because of unrelated existing baseline issues outside this slice; they were not introduced by this work.
